        - u^40*(u + 1)^4*(u^2 + 1)^3*(u^4 + 1)*(2*u^5 - u^4 - 5*u^3 + 5*u^2 + 17*u - 3)*v
        + u^41*(u + 1)^4*(u^2 + 1)^3*(u^4 + 1);

*x^26+7632010*G^9*x^25-7122270*G^9*x^24+3597450*G^9*x^23-813860*G^9*x^22-271580*G^9*x^21+341740*G^9*x^20-165110*G^9*x^19+49500*G^9*x^18-9710*G^9*x^17+1180*G^9*x^16-70*G^9*x^15+117*G^8*x^50-621*G^8*x^49-7848*G^8*x^48+120069*G^8*x^47-807102*G^8*x^46+3570462*G^8*x^45-11657754*G^8*x^44+29544615*G^8*x^43-59600583*G^8*x^42+96962337*G^8*x^41-128068812*G^8*x^40+137825271*G^8*x^39-121359708*G^8*x^38+88728012*G^8*x^37-57109986*G^8*x^36+38543328*G^8*x^35-34040421*G^8*x^34+35877528*G^8*x^33-33899859*G^8*x^32+22633776*G^8*x^31-5450742*G^8*x^30-8567586*G^8*x^29+12996522*G^8*x^28-9041382*G^8*x^27+2654721*G^8*x^26+1434060*G^8*x^25-2345238*G^8*x^24+1575297*G^8*x^23-648396*G^8*x^22+148806*G^8*x^21+378*G^8*x^20-12951*G^8*x^19+4194*G^8*x^18-486*G^8*x^17-27*G^8*x^16+9*G^8*x^15-16*G^7*x^51+256*G^7*x^50-2208*G^7*x^49+12376*G^7*x^48-41960*G^7*x^47+43704*G^7*x^46+370000*G^7*x^45-2516688*G^7*x^44+9055424*G^7*x^43-22984656*G^7*x^42+44588920*G^7*x^41-68411936*G^7*x^40+84287392*G^7*x^39-83524472*G^7*x^38+65454536*G^7*x^37-38349536*G^7*x^36+14212992*G^7*x^35-1845144*G^7*x^34+2335464*G^7*x^33-9228800*G^7*x^32+13753872*G^7*x^31-11598600*G^7*x^30+5160360*G^7*x^29+446504*G^7*x^28-2525728*G^7*x^27+1911744*G^7*x^26-647368*G^7*x^25-102728*G^7*x^24+272232*G^7*x^23-189208*G^7*x^22+86128*G^7*x^21-29144*G^7*x^20+7616*G^7*x^19-1528*G^7*x^18+216*G^7*x^17-16*G^7*x^16+7*G^6*x^51-91*G^6*x^50+567*G^6*x^49-2338*G^6*x^48+8148*G^6*x^47-32543*G^6*x^46+152495*G^6*x^45-650006*G^6*x^44+2199498*G^6*x^43-5781279*G^6*x^42+11933061*G^6*x^41-19621441*G^6*x^40+25927069*G^6*x^39-27412119*G^6*x^38+22380386*G^6*x^37-12280597*G^6*x^36+1292935*G^6*x^35+5736899*G^6*x^34-6184185*G^6*x^33+1542548*G^6*x^32+3709783*G^6*x^31-5790645*G^6*x^30+4328128*G^6*x^29-1585227*G^6*x^28-278117*G^6*x^27+756364*G^6*x^26-491540*G^6*x^25+158249*G^6*x^24+2408*G^6*x^23-32907*G^6*x^22+20475*G^6*x^21-7588*G^6*x^20+1869*G^6*x^19-287*G^6*x^18+21*G^6*x^17-30*G^5*x^50+534*G^5*x^49-4704*G^5*x^48+27480*G^5*x^47-119532*G^5*x^46+409578*G^5*x^45-1138182*G^5*x^44+2605362*G^5*x^43-4955208*G^5*x^42+7870434*G^5*x^41-10474404*G^5*x^40+11704206*G^5*x^39-10951524*G^5*x^38+8386164*G^5*x^37-4743384*G^5*x^36+1011702*G^5*x^35+1702452*G^5*x^34-2518104*G^5*x^33+1457202*G^5*x^32+346542*G^5*x^31-1496976*G^5*x^30+1456632*G^5*x^29-724950*G^5*x^28+66396*G^5*x^27+187842*G^5*x^26-157608*G^5*x^25+63702*G^5*x^24-10068*G^5*x^23-3684*G^5*x^22+2898*G^5*x^21-912*G^5*x^20+156*G^5*x^19-12*G^5*x^18+50*G^4*x^49-925*G^4*x^48+8230*G^4*x^47-46920*G^4*x^46+192195*G^4*x^45-599820*G^4*x^44+1473895*G^4*x^43-2906575*G^4*x^42+4654255*G^4*x^41-6103795*G^4*x^40+6617435*G^4*x^39-6014155*G^4*x^38+4668895*G^4*x^37-3120020*G^4*x^36+1694090*G^4*x^35-546995*G^4*x^34-148455*G^4*x^33+281985*G^4*x^32-13985*G^4*x^31-289625*G^4*x^30+369770*G^4*x^29-244530*G^4*x^28+80870*G^4*x^27+9010*G^4*x^26-25190*G^4*x^25+13555*G^4*x^24-3580*G^4*x^23+220*G^4*x^22+160*G^4*x^21-50*G^4*x^20+5*G^4*x^19-40*G^3*x^48+720*G^3*x^47-6124*G^3*x^46+32700*G^3*x^45-122788*G^3*x^44+344108*G^3*x^43-745616*G^3*x^42+1278600*G^3*x^41-1767848*G^3*x^40+2012228*G^3*x^39-1941584*G^3*x^38+1645696*G^3*x^37-1242056*G^3*x^36+779424*G^3*x^35-302732*G^3*x^34-70112*G^3*x^33+222928*G^3*x^32-168000*G^3*x^31+36736*G^3*x^30+48812*G^3*x^29-60036*G^3*x^28+34580*G^3*x^27-11012*G^3*x^26+888*G^3*x^25+880*G^3*x^24-436*G^3*x^23+92*G^3*x^22-8*G^3*x^21+15*G^2*x^47-249*G^2*x^46+1929*G^2*x^45-9234*G^2*x^44+30537*G^2*x^43-74145*G^2*x^42+138144*G^2*x^41-207108*G^2*x^40+266949*G^2*x^39-318969*G^2*x^38+362232*G^2*x^37-364038*G^2*x^36+279120*G^2*x^35-114171*G^2*x^34-52014*G^2*x^33+135816*G^2*x^32-123525*G^2*x^31+66258*G^2*x^30-18249*G^2*x^29-2388*G^2*x^28+5007*G^2*x^27-2532*G^2*x^26+726*G^2*x^25-120*G^2*x^24+9*G^2*x^23-2*G*x^46+26*G*x^45-152*G*x^44+528*G*x^43-1270*G*x^42+2710*G*x^41-7008*G*x^40+20054*G*x^39-48302*G*x^38+88038*G*x^37-118534*G*x^36+114998*G*x^35-73814*G*x^34+19710*G*x^33+16874*G*x^32-25614*G*x^31+17464*G*x^30-7336*G*x^29+1814*G*x^28-142*G*x^27-60*G*x^26+20*G*x^25-2*G*x^24+x^44-11*x^43+45*x^42-33*x^41-481*x^40+2611*x^39-7553*x^38+14859*x^37-21307*x^36+22737*x^35-17875*x^34+9789*x^33-3003*x^32-287*x^31+869*x^30-487*x^29+150*x^28-26*x^27+2*x^26)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
